changelog: Semantic Query Cache: L1 exakt + L2 Embedding-Similarity (60-80% weniger Ressourcen)
Async ASGI Server: uvicorn, 200+ concurrent Users, SSE-Streaming
GPU-Acceleration: CUDA auto-detect, GPU-Embeddings (60× schneller), Batch-512
Adaptive Batch Inference: Request-Aggregation, GPU-Batching, LLM-Queue
Multi-Tenant: API-Key Auth, isolierte Tabellen, per-Tenant Quotas
Tiered Retrieval: Bloom-Filter O(1), Binary Quantization (32× Kompression), Inverted Index
Prometheus Metriken: /metrics Endpunkt, Histogramme, GPU/RAM/Cache Monitoring
